{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185404D1B950D157CE9921E442"}"},"total":5},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610593450347545368","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"个人觉得本书文笔不错，节奏张弛有度，值得一看。","text_exts":[{"e":15,"s":13,"text":"张弛","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742632449921E442%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227610593450347545368%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227600751050798140441%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771984615,"group_id":"7600751050798140441","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4UmLYCO2kjUGFHHMAKigwA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p-passport-sign.bytedance.net/tos-cn-i-mgtsoo0paj/user-avatar_1e20a9c0463acb5c9ad8088dd3a5c458~tplv-noop.jpeg?x-orig-authkey=akmgtsoo0paj&x-orig-expires=2166079915&x-orig-sign=kjwi5W%2F1rExhrrP8OLtjdwM1LX4%3D","user_id":"391892904978957","user_name":"弱鸡爱健身"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"391892904978957","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600751050798140441","book_info":{"abstract":"重生回黄袍加身前，这次我拒绝野蛮兵变。
我叫赵匡胤。上一世，我陈桥兵变，杯酒释兵权，却被骂了千年篡位之贼。
这一世，我选择众望所归。
当契丹铁骑南下，我亲征大破敌军，让幼帝哭着求我登基。
当骄兵悍将不服，我一杯清酒，让他们心甘情愿交出兵权。
当天下未定，我以先知之眼布局，横扫南北。
从殿前点检到开国太祖，这一世，我的大宋将没有“斧声烛影”，没有“靖康之耻”，只有——万国来朝！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8bb5923a6ad60c2309587a4c8b292cbe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"喜欢雪柿子的苏长空","author_id":"","book_id":"7600751050798140441","book_name":"大宋：从殿前点检到开国太祖","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5431人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7600751174525927961","read_count":"5431","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"413368"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"162","tags":"历史古代,历史,宋朝,皇帝,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o8bb5923a6ad60c2309587a4c8b292cbe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447244&x-signature=wB07ejgbYMu1ZC85Frfj%2F1zcPVQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"99286751165","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"76"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185404D1B950D157CE9921E442"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":34529,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34589,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":177},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1771988393,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614875373682131737","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"亲爱的读者们：
本书写到这里，终于完成了“父子同心”这一卷。从赵匡胤陈桥兵变到德昭统一全球，从亚洲大陆到七大洲四大洋，一路走来，感谢大家的陪伴。
这本书的初衷很简单——让赵匡胤弥补遗憾，让大宋没有靖康之耻，让汉家旗帜插遍世界。至于历史是否严谨、逻辑是否完美，爽就完了。
接下来的第四卷，德昭将开启真正的全球盛世。希望大家继续支持，咱们一起见证大宋的星辰大海。
——作者留","text_exts":[{"e":34,"s":31,"text":"赵匡胤","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%B5%E5%8C%A1%E8%83%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742632449921E442%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227614875373682131737%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227600751050798140441%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%B5%E5%8C%A1%E8%83%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772979574,"group_id":"7600751050798140441","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不搞套路水字数，开局即巅峰","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5w9iKkKFSEspUyBlyHEMRg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cec4a9a640b444a293bb4ac978de6b94~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790282&x-signature=pOU3feKc87PGxvQf1lgGxJ%2B4It4%3D","user_id":"99286751165","user_name":"喜欢雪柿子的苏长空"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"99286751165","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1729136666,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_
